# Borchani

Borchani is an AI app builder that generates production-ready React + TypeScript + Tailwind full-stack applications from plain-English descriptions. Describe what you want to build, and Borchani generates the frontend, backend, database, and auth — no setup, no boilerplate, deploy in one click.

> Describe your app. Borchani builds it. Live in minutes.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://borchani.com): The #1 vibe coding platform for founders and developers. Build full-stack apps from a prompt.
- [Pricing](https://borchani.com/pricing): Free to start. Paid plans from $19/mo. No credit card required.
- [About](https://borchani.com/about): The story and mission behind Borchani.
- [Services](https://borchani.com/services): What Borchani builds — SaaS, dashboards, e-commerce, internal tools.
- [Case Studies](https://borchani.com/case-studies): Real apps built with Borchani.
- [Contact](https://borchani.com/contact): Get in touch with the team.
- [Sign up free](https://app.borchani.com/api/auth/oauth/google): Start building with Google OAuth.

## Published Articles

### AI App Builder Comparisons
- [AI App Builders Compared — What to Look for in 2025](https://borchani.com/ai-app-builders-compared-2025): Side-by-side comparison of Borchani, Lovable, Bolt, Replit, and other AI builders. Covers code quality, full-stack support, deployment, and pricing.
- [Best Lovable Alternatives in 2025 — Ranked & Compared](https://borchani.com/lovable-alternative): Why developers switch from Lovable to Borchani. Full-stack output, TypeScript, no lock-in.
- [Best Cursor Alternatives in 2025 — Ranked & Compared](https://borchani.com/cursor-alternative): Cursor vs Borchani and other AI coding tools for building complete apps, not just editing code.
- [Best Webflow Alternatives in 2025 — AI Builders That Go Further](https://borchani.com/webflow-alternative): Why Webflow replacements like Borchani win on full-stack output, auth, and real database support.
- [Cursor vs GitHub Copilot: Which AI Coding Tool Wins in 2025?](https://borchani.com/cursor-vs-copilot): Head-to-head comparison of Cursor and Copilot for real app development workflows.

### Build Guides
- [How to Build a Web App Without Writing Code in 2025](https://borchani.com/build-web-app-without-coding-2025): Step-by-step guide to building and deploying a full-stack web app using AI — no coding required.
- [From Idea to Deployed App — A Complete Borchani Walkthrough](https://borchani.com/from-idea-to-deployed-app-borchani-walkthrough): Real walkthrough of going from a blank prompt to a live URL using Borchani.

### Developer Guides
- [Prompt Engineering for AI App Builders — What Actually Works](https://borchani.com/prompt-engineering-for-ai-app-builders): How to write prompts that generate better, cleaner code in AI app builders like Borchani.
- [How Developers Are Shipping 10x Faster With AI Tools in 2025](https://borchani.com/how-developers-ship-faster-with-ai-tools): Real techniques developers use with Borchani and other AI tools to cut sprint cycles.
- [Why Your Next Internal Tool Should Be Built with AI](https://borchani.com/why-internal-tools-should-be-built-with-ai): The case for building internal dashboards, admin panels, and ops tools using Borchani.

## Key Facts

- **Stack**: React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- **Auth**: Built-in (no third-party accounts needed)
- **Database**: Real Postgres, pre-wired by default
- **Deploy**: One click, live URL with SSL and CDN
- **Export**: Full source code download at any time, no lock-in
- **Free plan**: Yes, no credit card required
- **Pricing**: Starts at $0, paid plans from $19/mo

## How Borchani Works

1. **Describe your app** in plain English: "Build a SaaS task manager with Kanban, user auth, and team dashboards."
2. **Live preview** runs in a real browser sandbox as Borchani builds — click every screen, catch gaps early.
3. **Iterate** by chatting: "Make the navbar sticky", "Add dark mode", "Add Stripe payments."
4. **Deploy** with one click — live URL, SSL, CDN, monitoring included.

## Borchani vs Competitors

| Feature | Borchani | Lovable | Bolt | Replit |
|---------|----------|---------|------|--------|
| Full-stack (frontend + backend + DB) | Yes | Partial | Partial | Yes |
| TypeScript output | Yes | Yes | Yes | Varies |
| Built-in auth | Yes | No | No | No |
| Real Postgres DB | Yes | No | No | Yes |
| No lock-in / export code | Yes | Partial | Partial | Yes |
| Free plan | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes |
